pain_points: Process Order:
C1.1.1 Client orders 22kg and 50kg cylinder variants. C1.1.2 C1.1.3
Fulfil Order:
C1.2.1 Using Sales Order, XX (Delivery Head) 💻schedules delivery [vehicle, capacity, route].
C1.1.2 Warehouse generates 📜Picklist and picks LPG/products.
C1.1.3 Warehouse generates 📜Delivery Receipt (2 DRs and 2 CRs).
C1.1.4.1 Warehouse submits 📜DR to Acctg to make General Ledger and Inventory.
C1.1.4.2 Driver gets 📜Delivery Receipt (DR) from Warehouse XXX? for multiple clients. Driver loads the cylinders. LUTXX.
📜Delivery Data include tank serial number, customer type, LUT number, gross weight, body/tare weight, and content out.
Driver and Pahinante drive to client locations.
C1.1.4.3 No Delivery/For Pick up. Warehouse XX gives 📜DR to customer for signature.
C1.1.5.1 On client site, Pahinante weighs and records the cylinders, then delivers the cylinders. He retrieves the empties cylinder/s and weighs XX it in the vehicle.
C1.1.5.2 Client signs 📜DR and picks up the items and returns empty cylinder. Client leaves.
C1.1.5.3 Check threshold <>1-3kg, above and below, roundup/down, classification. Acctg charges client based on agreed weight, not actual weight. Company absorbs any gains.
C1.1.6 P gives 📜Credit Notes to client, containing cylinder serial no, weight residue (kg), credit gain and 📜acknowledges receipt (via sign).
C1.1.7 Driver returns to Plant. LUTXX Driver and Warehouse Staff weigh XX empty cylinders in Plant. Driver writes the weights in 📜XX.
C1.1.8 Driver submits 📜record and signed 📜DR and 📜AR to Acctg.
C1.1.9 Acctg Staff reconciles open 💻General Ledger with signed 📜DR and 📜AR. Acctg Staff reconciles inventor in 💻Gsheet.
Compute Commercial Gains:
C1.3.1 Gather the weight in and weigh out records at the Client and at the Plant from the backload.
C1.3.2 Record in 💻Gsheet.
C1.3.3 Record in 💻ACPAC.
C1.3.4 Compute Commission and Distribute.
C2.1 Process Order:
C2.1.1 Industrial clients orders selected cylinder tanks. C2.1.2 C2.1.3
C2.2 Fulfil Order:
Check Industrial gains
C2.3 Compute Gains:
C2.3.5 Commission calculations
C3.1 Process Order:
C3.1.1 Client calls/texts/emails and orders 2.5kg and 11kg cylinder variants.
C3.1.2 Sales Rep creates a 📜Sales Order form with delivery/pickup date.
C3.1.2.1 IF PICKUP and with TERMS: Client comes to pickup, and signs the Sales Order Form, receives the Invoice.
C3.1.2.2 IF PICKUP and PAYMENT: Client comes to pickup and pays. Sales Rep remits money and Sales Order to Acctg staff
C3.1.2.3 IF DELIVERY and with TERMS: Driver checks schedule. Brings DR and cylinder. Driver team delivers and lets customer sign Sales Order.
C3.1.2.3.1 Driver gets empty cylinder, weighs and records. Let customer sign for Credit Terms. Driver returns cylinder to the Plant
C3.2 Fulfil Order:
C3.3 Compute Operational Gains:
Commission calculations
ALERT: Cylinder brand switching
C4.1 Process Order:
C4.2 Fulfil Order: Order fulfillment procedures
C4.3 Compute Gains: Commission calculations
Same as above Dealer steps
C5.1.1 Purchaser forwards PO to RefinerySupplier. Purchaser schedules and informs Plant Manager on scheduled delivery of Lorry Truck
xxxx
Plant Manager receives the Purchased Lorry Trucks XX and gets the 📜DR and 📜Invoice from delivery team.
C5.1.2 Plant Manager fills up 📜Receiving Report (RR), and unloads contents to Storage Tank.
C5.1.3 Plant Staff measures content volume using gauge and takes photo of the gauge. Makes 📜report.
C5.1.3.1 Changes in the qty are reported after the 📜Receiving Report.
C5.1.4 Stock Transfer: Gas content is refilled from Storage Tank to cylinders following FIFO process. Filled cylinders are located in the 'Floor Stock'.
C5.1.5 Use 📱Google apps for refilling cylinders.
2 Storage Locations: Tank 1 and Tank2
2 Types of Residue: Regular and WIWO. Regular Residue affects inventory count but not billing. WIWO affects inventory count and billing (as credits).
Next-step ownership is unclear
Schedule and follow Pull-out Calendar and Pull-out Dates at client sites.
Cylinder Monitoring:
C5.3.1 Cylinders are purchased annually. They have individual serial nos. (S/N).
C5.3.2 Cylinders have lifespan of X years. Required to Repaint and testing XXX. Put batch no for commissioning
